summary: The diff modifies CashierPage.tsx to implement all four requirements: a unified product panel with max 10 pinned items (REQ-1), a 'Select Displayed Items' dialog with localStorage persistence (REQ-2), a single unified search bar replacing the split inputs (REQ-3), and a search popup/dropdown with cart-add functionality (REQ-4). The implementation appears comprehensive based on the file summary and truncated code.
